mapper.insert: insert into PRT_PORTINFO (VC_PORT_TYPE_1, VC_PORT_TYPE_2, VC_FUND_NAME_O32, VC_INSUR_INFO, VC_FUND_ID_O32, VC_ASSET_ID_O32, VC_COMBI_NAME_O32, VC_COMBI_NO_O32, VC_COMBI_ID_O32, VC_FUND_CODE_GP3, VC_COMBI_CODE_GP3, VC_DEFAULE_COMBI, VC_IS_MERGER, VC_FUND_NAME_GP3, VC_COMBI_NAME_GP3, VC_ACCOUNT, VC_NOMMANAGER, VC_ACTMANAGER, VC_INVMANAGER, VC_CONFIG, VC_CUSTODIAN, VC_BANK_ACCOUNT, VC_INVOPERATION, VC_CURRENCY, VC_SUMMARY, VC_FUND_CODE_JSZ, VC_FUND_NAME_JSZ, VC_COMBI_CODE_HS, VC_FUND_CODE_HS, VC_FUND_NAME_WEB, VC_FUND_CODE_TA, VC_FUND_CODE_REP, VC_FUND_CODE_IDC, VC_INSUR_NO, L_SERIAL_NO, VC_DEPARTMENT_NAME, VC_IS_CLOSED_ACCOUNTING, VC_MANAGEMENT_TYPE, VC_CRM_PROD_NO, C_IS_VALID, VC_COMBI_DEPARTMENT_NAME, D_UPDATETIME, L_BEGINDATA_COMBI, L_ENDDATA_COMBI, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcPortType1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcPortType2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundNameO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInsurInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundIdO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcAssetIdO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiNameO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiNoO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiIdO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeGp3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiCodeGp3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDefauleCombi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcIsMerger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundNameGp3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiNameGp3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcNommanager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcActmanager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInvmanager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcConfig,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCustodian,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInvoperation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeJsz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundNameJsz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCombiCodeHs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeHs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundNameWeb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeTa,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeRep,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFundCodeIdc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInsurNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lSerialNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcIsClosedAccounting,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcManagementType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCrmProdNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cIsValid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcCombiDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lBegindataCombi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEnddataCombi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_PORT_TYPE_1, VC_PORT_TYPE_2, VC_FUND_NAME_O32, VC_INSUR_INFO, VC_FUND_ID_O32, VC_ASSET_ID_O32, VC_COMBI_NAME_O32, VC_COMBI_NO_O32, VC_COMBI_ID_O32, VC_FUND_CODE_GP3, VC_COMBI_CODE_GP3, VC_DEFAULE_COMBI, VC_IS_MERGER, VC_FUND_NAME_GP3, VC_COMBI_NAME_GP3, VC_ACCOUNT, VC_NOMMANAGER, VC_ACTMANAGER, VC_INVMANAGER, VC_CONFIG, VC_CUSTODIAN, VC_BANK_ACCOUNT, VC_INVOPERATION, VC_CURRENCY, VC_SUMMARY, VC_FUND_CODE_JSZ, VC_FUND_NAME_JSZ, VC_COMBI_CODE_HS, VC_FUND_CODE_HS, VC_FUND_NAME_WEB, VC_FUND_CODE_TA, VC_FUND_CODE_REP, VC_FUND_CODE_IDC, VC_INSUR_NO, L_SERIAL_NO, VC_DEPARTMENT_NAME, VC_IS_CLOSED_ACCOUNTING, VC_MANAGEMENT_TYPE, VC_CRM_PROD_NO, C_IS_VALID, VC_COMBI_DEPARTMENT_NAME, D_UPDATETIME, L_BEGINDATA_COMBI, L_ENDDATA_COMBI, ETL_TIME from PRT_PORTINFO

SELECT L_FUND_ID AS VC_FUND_ID_O32, VC_FUND_NAME AS VC_FUND_NAME_O32 FROM TRADE.TFUNDINFO WHERE C_FUND_STATUS = '2'
and (L_FUND_ID = #{funId} or L_FUND_ID like CONCAT(#{funId}, '%'))
and (VC_FUND_NAME = #{funId} or VC_FUND_NAME like CONCAT(#{funId}, '%'))
order by L_FUND_ID

SELECT a.L_FUND_ID, a.VC_FUND_NAME, b.L_COMBI_ID, b.VC_COMBI_NAME FROM
(SELECT L_FUND_ID, VC_FUND_NAME FROM TRADE.TFUNDINFO WHERE C_FUND_STATUS = '2') a
INNER JOIN
(SELECT L_COMBI_ID, L_FUND_ID, VC_COMBI_NAME FROM TRADE.TCOMBI WHERE C_COMBI_STATUS = '1') b
on a.L_FUND_ID = B.L_FUND_ID
WHERE a.L_FUND_ID = #{funId}

SELECT a.L_FUND_ID AS VC_FUND_ID_O32, a.VC_FUND_NAME AS VC_FUND_NAME_O32, b.L_COMBI_ID AS VC_COMBI_ID_O32, b.VC_COMBI_NAME AS VC_COMBI_NAME_O32 FROM
(SELECT L_FUND_ID, VC_FUND_NAME FROM TRADE.TFUNDINFO WHERE C_FUND_STATUS = '2') a
INNER JOIN
(SELECT L_COMBI_ID, L_FUND_ID, VC_COMBI_NAME FROM TRADE.TCOMBI WHERE C_COMBI_STATUS = '1') b
on a.L_FUND_ID = B.L_FUND_ID
WHERE a.L_FUND_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT a.L_FUND_ID, a.VC_FUND_NAME FROM TRADE.TFUNDINFO a WHERE a.C_FUND_STATUS = '2' and a.L_FUND_ID in
#{id}
SELECT a.L_FUND_ID, a.VC_FUND_NAME FROM TRADE.TFUNDINFO a WHERE a.C_FUND_STATUS = '2' and a.L_FUND_ID = #{funId}
